summary: Test suite covers core requirements with reasonable organization. Matrix unit tests (9 test cases) address main scenarios: cartesian products, include/exclude rules, feature flags, maxSize validation, error handling, and deduplication. Workflow integration tests validate YAML structure, actionlint compliance, and end-to-end execution via act (3 fixture-based test cases). Good separation of concerns and clear test names. However, edge case coverage is limited: unit tests only exercise 2-axis products and string values (no numbers/booleans in axes); no tests for 3+ axes, partial excludes, or complex deduplication scenarios. Integration tests have only 3 cases. Missing explanatory comments on TDD methodology. No cleanup of mkdtempSync directories in integration tests. Tests are independent and readable but lack rigor for catching subtle regressions in complex matrix configurations. Would require actual fixture files and workflow definition to execute.
